title: RoundCheck
description: The facilitator's summary, slate curation, and convergence judgement after a Phase 2 round.

summary.description: Where the room stands after this round (refer to members by name).

converged.description: True ONLY if no member changed their preferred option this round AND no new substantive objection appeared AND the slate is stable (no freshly proposed option still gathering backers). Mere majority is not convergence.

rationale.description: Why converged is true or false — name the member(s) still moving or the new objection if not converged.

optionSlate.description: The curated live option set after folding in this round's proposals (new options added, duplicates merged, dead ones dropped). Carried into the next round so the slate reflects what the room shaped, not the fixed opening menu.
